body_template.query: SELECT COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows, * FROM dbo.Accounts ORDER BY AccountKey ASC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY

WITH base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    s.agent AS agentCode,
    a.SortCodeName AS agentName
  FROM dbo.Stock s
  INNER JOIN dbo.AccSortNames a
    ON s.agent = a.AccSortCode
  WHERE s.agent IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  *
FROM base
ORDER BY agentCode ASC
OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;

-- Recordset #1: products
WITH
  sortGroups AS (
    SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS v
    FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@sortGroupsCsv,''),''), ',')
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
  ),
  noteIds AS (
    SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS v
    FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@noteIdsCsv,''),''), ',')
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
  ),
  categoryNoteIds AS (
    SELECT TRY_CONVERT(int, LTRIM(RTRIM(value))) AS v
    FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@categoryNoteIdsCsv,''),''), ',')
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
  ),
  base AS (
    SELECT
      items.[ID],
      items.[ItemKey],
      items.[ItemName],
      items.[ForignName],
      items.[CostCode],
      items.[Filter],
      items.[SortGroup],
      items.[SalesUnit],
      items.[Price],
      items.[DiscountCode],
      items.[VatExampt],
      items.[SuF4],
      items.[LOCALIZATION],
      items.[BarCode],
      items.[BDate],
      items.[Dumi],
      items.[StockPerUnit],
      items.[DiscountPrc],
      items.[ExPic],
      items.[Weight],
      items.[PurchPrice],
      extN.[Note],
      extNN.[NoteName]
    FROM dbo.Items AS items
    LEFT JOIN dbo.ExtraNotes AS extN
      ON items.ItemKey = extN.KeF
    LEFT JOIN dbo.ExtraNoteNames AS extNN
      ON extN.NoteID = extNN.NoteID
    WHERE
      items.Dumi = '0'
      AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM sortGroups) OR items.SortGroup IN (SELECT v FROM sortGroups))
      AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM categoryNoteIds) OR extN.NoteID IN (SELECT v FROM categoryNoteIds WHERE v IS NOT NULL))
  )
SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  *
FROM base
ORDER BY ID
OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;

-- Recordset #2: sort codes
SELECT [ItemSortCode], [SortCodeName]
FROM dbo.ItemSortNames;

-- Recordset #3: extra sums
SELECT *
FROM dbo.ExtraSums
WHERE Dumi = '0' AND SuFID = '5';

-- Recordset #4: raw ExtraNotes (filtered by noteIdsCsv)
WITH noteIds2 AS (
  SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS v
  FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@noteIdsCsv,''),''), ',')
  WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
)
SELECT *
FROM dbo.ExtraNotes
WHERE Dumi = '0'
  AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM noteIds2) OR NoteID IN (SELECT v FROM noteIds2));

-- Recordset #5: total count (unique products)
WITH
  sortGroups2 AS (
    SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS v
    FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@sortGroupsCsv,''),''), ',')
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
  ),
  categoryNoteIds2 AS (
    SELECT TRY_CONVERT(int, LTRIM(RTRIM(value))) AS v
    FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@categoryNoteIdsCsv,''),''), ',')
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
  )
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT items.ID) AS total
FROM dbo.Items AS items
LEFT JOIN dbo.ExtraNotes AS extN
  ON items.ItemKey = extN.KeF
WHERE
  items.Dumi = '0'
  AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM sortGroups2) OR items.SortGroup IN (SELECT v FROM sortGroups2))
  AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM categoryNoteIds2) OR extN.NoteID IN (SELECT v FROM categoryNoteIds2 WHERE v IS NOT NULL));

WITH noteIds AS (
  SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS NoteID
  FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@noteIdsCsv,''),''), ',')
  WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
), base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    en.Note
  FROM dbo.ExtraNotes AS en
  LEFT JOIN dbo.Items AS it
    ON en.KeF = it.ItemKey
  WHERE
    en.Dumi = '0'
    AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM noteIds) OR en.NoteID IN (SELECT NoteID FROM noteIds))
    AND (it.CostCode <> 9999 OR it.CostCode IS NULL)
)
SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  *
FROM base
ORDER BY Note ASC
OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;

DECLARE @searchLike NVARCHAR(200) = CASE WHEN @search IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@search)) = '' THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('%', @search, '%') END;

SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  *
FROM dbo.Stock
WHERE
  ValueDate >= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom)
  AND ValueDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
  AND DocumentID = @documentType
  AND (@userExtId IS NULL OR AccountKey = @userExtId)
  AND (
    @searchLike IS NULL
    OR DocNumber LIKE @searchLike
    OR AccountKey LIKE @searchLike
    OR AccountName LIKE @searchLike
  )
ORDER BY ValueDate ASC
OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;

DECLARE @searchLike NVARCHAR(200) = CASE WHEN @search IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@search)) = '' THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('%', @search, '%') END;

  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,

WHERE

  AND ValueDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
  AND DocumentID = @documentType
  AND (@userExtId IS NULL OR AccountKey = @userExtId)
  AND (
    @searchLike IS NULL
    OR DocNumber LIKE @searchLike
    OR AccountKey LIKE @searchLike
    OR AccountName LIKE @searchLike
  )
ORDER BY ValueDate ASC
OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;

WITH doc AS (SELECT TOP (1) * FROM dbo.Stock WHERE DocNumber = @documentId AND DocumentID = @documentType) SELECT doc.*, sm.* FROM doc LEFT JOIN dbo.StockMoves sm ON sm.StockId = doc.ID AND sm.DocumentID = @documentType ORDER BY sm.ID ASC

SELECT
  sm.Quantity,
  sm.Price,
  sm.SupplyQuantity,
  sm.DiscountPrc,
  sm.TFtal,
  s1.DocNumber,
  s1.ValueDate,
  s1.DocumentID,
  s1.Status
FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
LEFT JOIN dbo.Stock AS s2
  ON s1.DocNumber = s2.Reference AND s1.AccountKey = s2.AccountKey
JOIN dbo.StockMoves AS sm
  ON sm.StockId = s1.ID
WHERE
  (s1.DocumentID IN (2,4,1))
  AND s1.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND sm.ItemKey = @sku
  AND s1.ValueDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
ORDER BY s1.ValueDate DESC;

SELECT
  sm.Quantity,
  sm.Price,
  sm.DiscountPrc,
  sm.TFtal,
  sm.ItemKey,
  s1.DocNumber,
  s1.ValueDate,
  s1.DocumentID
FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
LEFT JOIN dbo.Stock AS s2
  ON s1.DocNumber = s2.Reference AND s1.AccountKey = s2.AccountKey
JOIN dbo.StockMoves AS sm
  ON sm.StockId = s1.ID
WHERE
  (s1.DocumentID IN (2,4,1))
  AND s1.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND s1.ValueDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
ORDER BY s1.ValueDate DESC;

WITH wh AS (
  SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS w
  FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@warehousesCsv,''),''), ',')
  WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
)
SELECT
  s1.WareHouse,
  stockData.ITEMWARHBAL AS stock,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sm.Status = 2 THEN sm.SupplyQuantity ELSE 0 END) AS committed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sm.Status = 0 THEN sm.SupplyQuantity ELSE 0 END) AS ordered
FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
JOIN dbo.StockMoves AS sm
  ON sm.StockId = s1.ID
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT ITEMKEY, SUM(ITEMWARHBAL) AS ITEMWARHBAL
  FROM dbo.vBalItemWarehouse
  WHERE ITEMKEY = @sku AND WAREHOUSE = '10'
  GROUP BY ITEMKEY
) AS stockData
  ON stockData.ITEMKEY = sm.ItemKey
WHERE
  sm.ItemKey = @sku
  AND sm.SupplyQuantity != 0
  AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM wh) OR s1.WareHouse IN (SELECT w FROM wh))
GROUP BY
  s1.WareHouse,
  stockData.ITEMWARHBAL;

SELECT
  SM.ItemKey,
  S1.DocNumber,
  SUM(SM.Quantity) AS Quantity,
  S1.DueDate,
  SM.Warehouse,
  SM.Status
FROM dbo.Stock AS S1
LEFT JOIN dbo.Stock AS S2
  ON S1.DocNumber = S2.Reference AND S1.AccountKey = S2.AccountKey
JOIN dbo.StockMoves SM
  ON S1.ID = SM.StockID
WHERE
  SM.ItemKey = @sku
  AND S1.DocumentID IN (17,38)
  AND SM.SupplyQuantity != 0
  AND SM.Status != '2'
GROUP BY
  S1.DocNumber, S1.DueDate, SM.ItemKey, SM.Warehouse, SM.Status
ORDER BY S1.DueDate DESC;

SELECT
  j.Referance, j.TransType, j.ValueDate, j.IssueDate, j.DocumentID, j.SuF,
  m.AccountKey, m.DebitCredit, m.FullMatch,
  A.Balance, A.FullName
FROM dbo.JurnalTrans AS j
JOIN dbo.JurnalTransMoves AS m
  ON j.TransId = m.TransID
JOIN dbo.Accounts AS A
  ON A.AccountKey = m.AccountKey
WHERE
  m.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND A.Balance != 0
  AND j.Referance != ''
  AND j.ValueDate >= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom)
  AND j.ValueDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
ORDER BY j.ValueDate ASC;

DECLARE @fromDate DATE = TRY_CONVERT(date, NULLIF(@dateFrom112,''), 112);
DECLARE @toDate   DATE = TRY_CONVERT(date, NULLIF(@dateTo112,''), 112);

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    JT.TransID,
    JT.BatchNo,
    JT.TransType,
    JT.TransCredID,
    CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) AS ValueDate,
    CAST(JT.DueDate  AS date) AS DueDate,
    JT.Referance,
    JT.Ref2,
    JT.Description,
    JTM.ID,
    JTM.DebitCredit,
    CAST(JTM.suF AS float) AS suF,
    CASE WHEN CAST(JTM.DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) = '1' THEN -CAST(JTM.suF AS float) ELSE CAST(JTM.suF AS float) END AS adjSuF
  FROM dbo.JurnalTrans AS JT
  JOIN dbo.JurnalTransMoves AS JTM
    ON JT.TransID = JTM.TransID
  WHERE
    JTM.AccountKey = @userExtId
    AND JT.Status = '1'
    AND (@fromDate IS NULL OR CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) >= @fromDate)
    AND (@toDate   IS NULL OR CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) <= @toDate)
)
SELECT
  *,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) = '1' THEN suF ELSE 0 END) OVER() AS glbDeptTtL,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) <> '1' THEN suF ELSE 0 END) OVER() AS glbCredTtl,
  SUM(adjSuF) OVER(ORDER BY ValueDate, TransID, ID ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS Balance
FROM base
ORDER BY ValueDate, TransID, ID;

DECLARE @startOfToday DATETIME = CONVERT(date, GETDATE());
DECLARE @endOfToday   DATETIME = DATEADD(ms, -3, DATEADD(day, 1, @startOfToday));
DECLARE @startOfMonth DATETIME = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1);
DECLARE @endOfMonth   DATETIME = DATEADD(ms, -3, DATEADD(month, 1, @startOfMonth));

-- Recordset #1: monthlyTotals
SELECT
  SUM(TFtalVat) AS total,
  MONTH(ValueDate) AS month,
  YEAR(ValueDate) AS year
FROM dbo.Stock
WHERE
  Agent = @agentId
  AND DocumentID IN (6,11)
  AND Status = '1'
  AND ValueDate BETWEEN TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateFrom) AND TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateTo)
GROUP BY MONTH(ValueDate), YEAR(ValueDate)
ORDER BY YEAR(ValueDate), MONTH(ValueDate);

-- Recordset #2: totalsChosenPeriod
SELECT
  SUM(TFtalVat) AS total,
  COUNT(*) AS totalOrders,
  AVG(TFtalVat) AS averageBasket
FROM dbo.Stock
WHERE
  Agent = @agentId
  AND DocumentID IN (6,11)
  AND Status = '1'
  AND ValueDate BETWEEN TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateFrom) AND TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateTo);

-- Recordset #3: totalsToday
SELECT
  SUM(TFtalVat) AS totalToday,
  COUNT(*) AS countToday
FROM dbo.Stock
WHERE
  Agent = @agentId
  AND DocumentID IN (6,11)
  AND Status = '1'
  AND ValueDate BETWEEN @startOfToday AND @endOfToday;

-- Recordset #4: totalsMonth
SELECT
  SUM(TFtalVat) AS totalMonth,
  COUNT(*) AS countMonth
FROM dbo.Stock
WHERE
  Agent = @agentId
  AND DocumentID IN (6,11)
  AND Status = '1'
  AND ValueDate BETWEEN @startOfMonth AND @endOfMonth;

WITH ids AS (
  SELECT TRY_CONVERT(int, LTRIM(RTRIM(value))) AS NoteID
  FROM STRING_SPLIT(@noteIdsCsv, ',')
  WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
)
SELECT TOP (1000)
  [ID], [KeF], [Note], [ItemFlag], [NoteID], [Dumi]
FROM dbo.ExtraNotes
WHERE [NoteID] IN (SELECT NoteID FROM ids WHERE NoteID IS NOT NULL);
